packageDirectories.versionName: ver 0.3.0 — org-wide entitlements, SourceOrg multi-org, junction UI
packageDirectories.versionDescription: Org-wide entitlements surfaced by LM_OrgLimitsController + the lmOrgLimits LWC (capacity limits and usage-based entitlement progress bars) inside the CRM Analytics dashboard (#3); SourceOrg dimension stamped across the recipe datasets with a dynamically grouping dashboard, plus a documented manual runbook for consolidating multiple orgs (#4); admin UI for the LM_PersonaPurchaseAllocation junction (#5); faceted License-grain financial utilization table (#6). View https://github.com/tiagonnascimento/sf-license-manager/blob/main/README.md
